title: OrbitalStrike
description: This Data Pack adds an Orbital Strike that summons TNT with massive explosions.
body:
# Orbital Strike by schnipelberger #
This Data Pack adds a massive nuke shot that destroys everything thats in the radius. In future updates there will be added a stab shot too. This Data Pack is inspired by the Orbital Strike Cannon by cubicmetre who designed the machine and wemmbu who used it on Unstable SMP and Lifesteal SMP.

# How to use #
1. Get a Fishing Rod
2. Throw it out

**WARNING**:
This Data Pack can work in survial mode too. Please watch out where you ignite it cause it does a lot of damage and can destroy years of hard work. Please note that every fishing rod does ignite the Orbital Strike. A discrete fishing rod will be added in future updates.

# Have fun! #
